notes: Since the last update, the game starts. I can't match with the default proton, but when changed to proton-tkg (4.12.1 currently), I can match and play the game normally. The only issue I have is the problem with mouse, when I sometimes can't choose the upgrades in buy menu (but can shoot just fine), though I think it's the plethora of mouse-related tweaks I have applied.
title: Hired Ops

notes: Game launches fine and gets 60 FPS in menu, but it's impossible to join a game as the matchmaker will never find any server to join. Probably caused by anticheat.
title: Hired Ops

notes: After extracting the Proton tkg build (https://github.com/Tk-Glitch/PKGBUILDS/releases) to ~/.steam/root/compatibilitytools.d and selecting it in the hired ops properties, online play works fine. However after a while the mouse is frozen in menus. Aiming works fine but you cant select any upgrades anymore. This might be fixed when running in borderless windowed but I didnt have time to test further. Occasionally crashes.
title: Hired Ops

notes: Doesn't work anymore after update, not even with specific Proton version mentioned below. Can't connect to any server, as before.
title: Hired Ops
